---
title: "Mary Caroline Butler"
---

## Mary Caroline Butler

**Dates:** (b.1855)

**Maiden name:** (Humphry)

### Description

wife of Arthur Butler, contributor to <i>Mothers in Council</i>

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev. William Gilson Humphry, Vicar of St. Martin's in the Fields, she married Arthur Butler in 1875.

### Letters

- [To Mary Caroline Butler, April 11th 1899](../letters/3403_To_Mary_Caroline_Butler.html)
- Letter from January 17, 1894
- Letter from Sept 19th 1892

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
